title: Clock scheduling issue in a clock gating cell

features.name: latch-based clock enable signal
features.description: Code should include an always_latch block that generates a clock enable signal from a combinatorial enable value

features.name: gated clock assignment using enable signal
features.description: Code should include a gated clock assignment where clock is ANDed with an enable signal derived from a latch

features.name: verilator clock_enable attribute on latch output
features.description: Code should include a verilator clock_enable attribute applied to a latch output signal to explicitly mark it for clock gating recognition
